artifacts.title: Active Role-Jet Orbit Calculus
artifacts.summary: Canonical Paper I strengthened with the symbolic n=3 RoleChSpec quotient converse, an all-finite-order active-rechart recurrence, and the ambient-n channel law with explicit n=4 grid.

claims.statement: On the regular n=3 locus, equality of full RoleChSpec fingerprints is equivalent to equality modulo the gauge image Im G_g; the recovery minor has determinant 32/(g1 g2 g3).
claims.scope: Paper I, regular same-gradient n=3 Hessian gauge quotient.

claims.statement: The homogeneous recurrence q_d=-a^-1 R_d constructs every finite inverse jet and commutes with truncation for every finite word in the active-role generators.
claims.scope: Paper I, finite jets on regular charts with nonzero first-order role denominator.

claims.statement: The sigma_2 channel law is a sum of coordinate-triple contributions in ambient n, and the complete n=4 Gaussian-Kronecker row has four explicit Newton channels.
claims.scope: Paper I ambient channel decomposition; no n>=4 RoleChSpec injectivity or singular-stratum claim.

claims.scope: Paper III corridor-restricted native image; excludes whole-surface saturation and scalar special-value relations.
